name: LD2412 Sensor
description: The `ld2412` sensor platform allows you to use HI-LINK LD2412 motion and presence sensors with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart), which is necessary if you have multiple UARTs defined in your configuration.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this component.
